title.text: Landmarks and Places of Interest in the City of Melbourne
title.subtitle: Interactive map of schools, theatres, health services, sports facilities, places of worship, galleries and museums

transform.calculate: isValid(datum.properties.Name) ? datum.properties.Name : isValid(datum.properties.name) ? datum.properties.name : isValid(datum.properties['Feature Name']) ? datum.properties['Feature Name'] : isValid(datum.properties.feature_name) ? datum.properties.feature_name : 'Unnamed place'

isValid(datum.properties.Address) ? datum.properties.Address : isValid(datum.properties.address) ? datum.properties.address : isValid(datum.properties['Street Address']) ? datum.properties['Street Address'] : isValid(datum.properties.street_address) ? datum.properties.street_address : ''

isValid(datum.properties.Theme) ? datum.properties.Theme : isValid(datum.properties.theme) ? datum.properties.theme : isValid(datum.properties.Type) ? datum.properties.Type : isValid(datum.properties.type) ? datum.properties.type : ''

lower((isValid(datum.properties.Name) ? datum.properties.Name : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties.name) ? datum.properties.name : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties['Feature Name']) ? datum.properties['Feature Name'] : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties.feature_name) ? datum.properties.feature_name : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties.Theme) ? datum.properties.Theme : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties.theme) ? datum.properties.theme : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties.Type) ? datum.properties.Type : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties.type) ? datum.properties.type : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties['Sub Theme']) ? datum.properties['Sub Theme'] : '') + ' ' + (isValid(datum.properties.sub_theme) ? datum.properties.sub_theme : ''))

indexof(datum.combined_text, 'school') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'college') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'university') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'education') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'campus') >= 0 ? 'Education' : indexof(datum.combined_text, 'theatre') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'theater') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'perform') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'cinema') >= 0 ? 'Theatre' : indexof(datum.combined_text, 'hospital') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'health') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'medical') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'clinic') >= 0 ? 'Health services' : indexof(datum.combined_text, 'sport') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'stadium') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'recreation') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'oval') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'pool') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'court') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'gym') >= 0 ? 'Sports facilities' : indexof(datum.combined_text, 'church') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'mosque') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'synagogue') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'temple') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'cathedral') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'worship') >= 0 ? 'Places of worship' : indexof(datum.combined_text, 'gallery') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'museum') >= 0 || indexof(datum.combined_text, 'art') >= 0 ? 'Galleries / museums' : 'Other'
